  "clinical_presentation": "Patient presents to the emergency clinic following a referral from their GP. Patient reports feeling 'bonkers' and 'not very clever' due to a perceived lack of time from their GP to listen to their concerns. Patient describes a delusion of grandeur, believing they have a 'cure for world hunger' and are 'fantastic' and 'doing a really good job'. Patient reports receiving voice commands from a 'big guy with a big beard' (God) who tells them they are 'fantastic' and 'doing a really good job', and that they should 'show it to people'.
